## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss SEO improvements, content strategy, and technical fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple technical SEO issues identified (duplicate content, pagination problems, meta titles missing)](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Content performance improving across categories (214 clicks, up from 184; impressions up 30%)](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [120-130 keywords now ranking in top 10 of Google for newly published articles](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Plan to refresh content in business phone number cluster and fix technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Duplicate content found (e.g., Nooks page under answering services)](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Pagination issues across blog, business productivity, and project management sections](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Missing meta titles on news and pricing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Internal links with "follow force" issues](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [HTTP instead of HTTPS links in some places](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Nofollow attributes on internal links in help articles](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

**Action items:**

  - [Bob to implement 301 redirect for Nooks page](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Investigate source of pagination issues](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Add meta titles to news and pricing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Clean up internal linking issues (200 URLs affected)](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Check Intercom settings for nofollow attributes](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [300 out of 453 planned blogs published](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [50 more blogs to be published next week](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Clicks increased from 184 to 214](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Impressions up 30% (120k to 150k)](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [BPO and salon categories now performing better](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [120-130 keywords ranking in top 10 of Google for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

**Next steps:**

  - [Publish 28 new articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Refresh 20-25 articles in business productivity cluster](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

### Website Design Improvements

  - [Remove duplicate "top articles" section on blog page](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Consider hiring Webflow expert for design fixes and enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/Kyz9Uxfpv6ZJmNpLogKf17bC6WVZvwqP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
